tagline: Turn fleeting moments into guided memories.

designSystem.style: Modern violet-forward memory app with clean card-based layout, soft purple surfaces, vibrant accent gradients, and polished dark mode. Combines emotional warmth with structured utility — cinematic story cards meet practical step-builder UI.

screens: Home — Stories feed with greeting, stats, and rich recap cards with highlight timestamps
Library — Grouped clip grid by story with filter tabs (All, People, Tasks, Moments)
Builder — Interactive step-by-step guide player with video frame previews and step list
Search — Natural language search with recent queries, quick finds, and AI suggestion prompt
Settings — Profile, dark mode toggle, AI intelligence controls, privacy and export options
